SyncCollections.SyncSql: SELECT CardCode as Id, CardName as Content, CardType FROM OCRD WHERE UpdateDate >= coalesce((select convert(date, LastSyncTime) from Vector_SyncTracker where CollectionName='OCRD'), '19990101')
SELECT Id, QueryDescription as Content, QueryText FROM FewShotQueries
SELECT SlpCode Id, SlpName as Content FROM OSLP
SELECT ItmsGrpCod Id, ItmsGrpNam as Content FROM OITB
SELECT ItemCode as Id, ItemName as Content FROM OITM WHERE UpdateDate >= coalesce((select convert(date, LastSyncTime) from Vector_SyncTracker where CollectionName='OITM'), '19990101')
